description: Published 772 SEO-compliant brand articles, all green across 3 on-page SEO categories (premium SEO, readability, inclusive language). Vetted and rejected 293 additional candidates for content, security, or compliance reasons.
Built a browser extension reducing per-task processing time by ~50% (from 15 min to 7-8 min).
Designed pre-research setup cutting LLM processing from 1m40s to 1m8s; reduced image-resize step from 45s to 15s (3× faster).
Scraped and consolidated contact information for ~15,500 regional companies into central lead database.
Hosted team workshop on agentic browser/computer-use frameworks and authored internal technical implementation guide for lead-database enrichment.
Used Notion's custom-agent framework to streamline project documentation and developed tooling extending its Worker SDK.
Designed and implemented multi-stage automation workflows for data preparation and validation processes.
Architected multi-agent systems ensuring specialized agents handled scraping, research, and classification tasks efficiently.
Conducted thorough security evaluations of agent skills and dependencies, safeguarding the automation pipeline.
Developing large-scale digital twins and autonomous robotic simulations to enhance operational efficiency.
Creating bespoke generative AI frameworks that merge theoretical research with practical applications.
Orchestrating integration of spatial computing and advanced AI models for high-fidelity simulations.
